descriptions.text: A Korean dictionary for the Nintendo DS. The original title (Touch Dic) caused mild controversy due to its name sounding perverse to native English speakers. It was later renamed to "Touch Dictionary".
Touch Dictionary (터치 딕셔너리, Teochi Diksyeoneori) (formerly known as Touch Dic) is a dictionary software title for the Nintendo DS released in 2005 exclusively in South Korea.
